title: Way Too Many Carrots
description:
I added WAY too many carrots to Minecraft.
65 Mob carrots and more!
body:
Have you ever wanted to blow up a village with a carrot rpg that shoots carrots at a rapid pace? Well with this mod you can! 

To get started make sure you grab a carrot to begin all the fun!

Video to go with the mod:<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/622c1GRQ-F4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

=============================================================================

#                       📃🥕 Includes the following :
==============================================================================
1. 🥕 GarrettTheCarrot Mob! (Just for goofy purposes 🤪)
2. 🥕 65 Custom Carrots inspired by vanilla Minecraft mobs!
3. 🥕 Carrot RPG and a carrot pew pew weapon
4. 🥕 Carrot Armor, Carrot sword, and a carrot pickaxe!
5. And ***MUCH*** More! 👀

**All items can be crafted in a crafting grid!**
==========================================================================
==========================================================================
#                       ✅ **Plans on things to add in the future**
__________________________________________________________________________

- Even MORE Carrot Madness and viewer ideas! 
- Possibly adding a carrot structure or bosses

Version 2 will include even more!

==========================================================================
# ✅ Why you should download this mod ❌
__________________________________________________________________________

If you like carrots or just like to mess around with things like carrots download this mod! Its a silly experience and I bet you will have a fun time goofing around and absolutly destroying anything in your path!

==========================================================================

# 📃**_NOTE_** ( Client side and server side are supported! )

==========================================================================

💖 Thank you for checking out this mod! I would appreciate it if you shared it with other people!
